支持的预览格式: 允许其他模块注册可预览的文件格式。Observer 可向 formats 数组添加 MIME 类型。
Supported preview formats: Allow other modules to register previewable file formats. Observers can add MIME types to the formats array.

支持的预览格式: 文件上传到存储之前触发，可用于验证或修改上传参数。
Supported preview formats: Triggered before file upload to storage, can be used to validate or modify upload parameters.

支持的预览格式: 文件成功上传后触发，可用于后续处理如生成缩略图、记录日志等。
Supported preview formats: Triggered after a file is successfully uploaded, can be used for subsequent processing such as generating thumbnails, logging, etc.

支持的预览格式: 文件删除前触发，可用于验证或阻止删除。
Supported preview formats: Triggered before file deletion, can be used to validate or prevent deletion.

支持的预览格式: 用户切换存储源时触发。
Supported preview formats: Triggered when the user switches the storage source.

支持的预览格式: 连接器URL未配置，请刷新页面
Supported preview formats: Connector URL not configured, please refresh the page

支持的预览格式: 请求超时，服务器可能繁忙
Supported preview formats: Request timed out, server may be busy

支持的预览格式: 请选择一个项目进行重命名

Supported preview formats: Please select at least one file

支持的预览格式: 请选择有效的文件（非文件夹）
Supported preview formats: Please select a valid file (not a folder)

支持的预览格式: 不能访问指定路径以外的目录
Supported preview formats: Cannot access directories outside the specified path

支持的预览格式: 请等待当前目录加载完成后再上传
Supported preview formats: Please wait for the current folder to load before uploading
